title: BetterMaces
body:
[![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acedb138dd2684f02a22a3d73565044b8359d5cc_0.webp)](https://github.com/DaRealProplay/bettermaces)

# BetterMaces
Welcome to BetterMaces! This plugin completely transforms standard Minecraft maces, introducing 5 unique, high-powered mace tiers. To keep combat intense and tactical, each mace features a distinct cooldown that scales depending on its tier.

## Tiers & Powers

### Bastion Mace
* **The Nether's Wrath** * **Cooldown:** Low
* **Abilities:** Forged in the fires of the Nether. Deals heavy base damage while crushing targets with Slowness and setting them ablaze with Ignite.

### Wither Mace
* **The Decay Bringer**
* **Cooldown:** Medium
* **Abilities:** Infused with a Wither Heart. Unleashes devastating 10x damage and decays opponents with brutal Wither II effects.

### End Mace
* **The Reality Breaker**
* **Cooldown:** High
* **Abilities:** Harnesses Void energy to strike with a massive 25x damage modifier, launching enemies into the air. Bound to its master—instantly vanishes if dropped.

### Void Mace
* **The Singularity**
* **Cooldown:** Very High
* **Abilities:** Obliterates targets with 50x damage, summons striking lightning on impact, and triggers a built-in Black Hole ability to trap nearby foes.

### Matrix Mace
* **The Thunderstorm**
* **Cooldown:** Extreme
* **Abilities:** The ultimate display of power. On impact, it instantly strikes the target with 25 consecutive lightning bolts, completely obliterating anything in its radius.

---

## Commands & Permissions

* `/givemace <player> <type>`
  * **Description:** Grants a specific tiered mace (Bastion, Wither, End, Void, or Matrix) to the targeted player.
  * **Permission:** `bettermaces.admin`
